title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Kinemon, Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kozuki Alliance as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The raid Approaches!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Seven days before the raid of Onigashima.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samurai have successfully obtained a large number of swords.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not approve, Lady Hiyori! To let go of a memento of your father, Lord Oden, like that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My father, Oden Kozuki, was a swordsman of the daito two-word style.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before he was executed, he gave both my brother and I

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: One of his swords each.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My brother received awe- no-habakiri*,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And I received Emma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Both are well-known blades, forged by well-known smoths.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: swords of venerable pedigree indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is exactly why you must not, my princess!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To allow this absolute Vagabond of a nobody

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To Wield Lord Oden's Blade would be unthink- able!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not know by what turn of events

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The blade of the sword god Ryuma ended up in your hands.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I think Moria probably stole it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But to the people of this country, that sword is revered as a relic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So much so that when it was stolen, the country itself fell into a deep sadness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Please return our treasure to Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm... well, if you'll give me a replacement, I mean... I guess...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though it was once he was already dead, Ryuma is a warrior with whom I've at least fought.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get it. I'll give the sword back, but at least let me go visit his grave once afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's completely delusional! Are you sure this man can be trusted, Princess?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samurai imprisoned in Rasetsu town have yet to be freed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Damn it... how are we supposed to...

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: What the hell happened to your alliance?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one you, kidd, and apoo had formed?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We'd been tricked...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Scratchmen Apoo was already under Kaido's umbrella.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "If you wish to join me, I will welcome you with open arms."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's always on the lookout for strong subordi- Nates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to create the strongest army ever, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At that time, our chance of victory was 0%.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: chance of successfully escaping, 0%. Chance of Surviv- ing if we just submitted, 40%.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There was only one real choice.

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: But Kidd and Killer refused.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They stood against him, and fought until they couldn't move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kaido isn't the type to kill people like that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He finds a way to break their spirits and forces them to serve him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not believe kidD will ever submit... which means he will die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: His crewmembers are most likely being told

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Do this or that and we'll think about freeing your captain."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The yonkou are different creatures than you or I.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Logic doesn't apply.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems your alliance with straw hat is doing well, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: made it all the way to wano without any problems, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But what now? Had a change of heart, have we?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I don't have to answer your questions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If letting me escape is your plan,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Amenage response

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then I'll happily join in.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Six days left until the OnigaShima RAID.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
